warnings: PNG contains two portrait sheets side by side rotated 90 degrees; this is the physical LEFT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 deg counter-clockwise to read), the higher-numbered sheet (12/22), paired with sheet 11/22 extracted as _1.json.

This is the last sub-category of top-level category 2 (หมวดงานสถาปัตยกรรม) - category 3 (หมวดงานระบบสุขาภิบาล) begins on the next PNG page (70). No category-2 grand total row (equivalent to 'รวมข้อ 2 หมวดงานสถาปัตยกรรม') appears on this sheet; that grand-total banner was already printed once on the category-2 index sheet (4/22, หน้า65_2.json) rather than repeated here.
All quantities re-verified at higher clarity (363, 381, 13, 52).
